title: galatella iberica
intro: Galatella iberica, also known as Iberian knapweed or blue knapweed, is a flowering plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Galatella iberica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
